abstract.text: Embedded wallets SDK for the Coinbase Developer Platform — authenticate users and sign transactions on EVM and Solana chains.

inlineContent.text: CDPCore provides a complete, end-to-end wallet experience for your iOS and macOS apps. Users authenticate with email, SMS, OAuth, or a custom JWT, and the SDK manages key generation, signing, and session lifecycle on their behalf.

code: let verified = try await client.verifyEmailOTP(VerifyEmailOTPOptions(flowId: result.flowId, otp: "123456"))
